rumors.detail: Agent Mike Makaab confirmed interest from several European clubs following Under-20 World Cup performances. Agent stated: 'There will always be interest in young, talented players like Mfundo Vilakazi... particularly when they continue to perform well for a football club like Kaizer Chiefs'
Agent Mike Makaab believes Vilakazi's Under-20 World Cup performances could pave the way for a European move
Kaizer Chiefs were looking to trim down their big squad to make it more manageable. Vilakazi not specifically named for exit but mentioned in context of squad restructuring
Danish Superliga clubs tracking Gyau after standout displays for Asante Kotoko
South African powerhouse Kaizer Chiefs identified Asante Kotoko midfielder Hubert Gyau as a transfer target after eye-catching performances. Sources indicated formal bid expected in coming days.

rumors.club: FC Midtjylland, Randers FC, Azam FC
rumors.detail: Danish outfits FC Midtjylland and Randers FC, along with Tanzanian side Azam FC, keeping tabs on highly rated Ghanaian midfielder. Agent downplayed suggestions of formal negotiations.

players.name: Mohamed Camara
players.confusionRisk: Mohamed Camara (b. 2000, Al-Sadd) — Malian defensive midfielder in Qatar, different player

rumors.detail: South African giants Kaizer Chiefs reported to be tracking Guinean international and Asante Kotoko goalkeeper Mohamed Camara. Clubs in ongoing discussions to reach agreement on potential transfer. Camara under contract with Kotoko until June 2026.

Asante Kotoko's star goalkeeper Mohamed Camara attracting interest from top African clubs with Kaizer Chiefs emerging as frontrunner. Kotoko management preparing for potential transfer and expected to demand significant transfer fee given Camara's importance to team and contract status.

Kumasi Asante Kotoko rejected bids for goalkeeper Mohammed Camara. Club determined to retain talented goalkeeper, citing his importance to team's success, experience, and leadership crucial to Kotoko's performance.
